pluginDescription: Watch Maidenhead grids while idle and automatically call stations from matching grids.
gridWatchOverviewDesc: Use this for chasing grids, expeditions, or activity areas. Most operators can enter a 4-character grid such as PM95; advanced users can switch to regex mode.
gridWatchListDesc: One grid or rule per line. Rules use the match mode below; legacy lines containing regex syntax such as ^, $, or .* are still treated as regex rules. Lines starting with # are comments.
gridMatchModeDesc: Exact works well for 4-character grids. Prefix can watch a wider area, fuzzy can find a fragment, and advanced regex is for users comfortable with regular expressions.
triggerModeDesc: Choose which message types can trigger grid watching. Direct calls to you are always included.
autocallPriorityDesc: When multiple autocall plugins match the same slot, the higher priority wins.
workedGridSkipEnabledDesc: When enabled, 4-character grids already present in the current logbook are skipped.
removeExactMatchAfterQSODesc: When enabled, an exact grid entry is removed from the watch list after a completed QSO.
gridWatchListInvalidRegexSyntax: Regex syntax cannot be parsed on line {{line}}. Check brackets, escaping, or quantifiers.
